member.name: M:API.Controllers.ActivityLogController.GetSystemLogs
member.summary: Retrieves all system-level activity logs.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ActivityLogController.GetProjectLogs(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves activity logs for a specific project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.AuthController.Register(Core.DTOs.Requests.RegisterRequest)
member.summary: Registers a new user account with the Annotator role.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(Core.DTOs.Requests.LoginRequest)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.AuthController.RefreshToken(Core.DTOs.Requests.RefreshTokenRequest)
member.summary: Refreshes an expired access token using a valid refresh token.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.AuthController.Logout
member.summary: Logs out the current user and revokes all refresh tokens.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.AuthController.ForgotPassword(Core.DTOs.Requests.ForgotPasswordRequest)
member.summary: Returns instructions for password reset (contact Admin).

member.name: M:API.Controllers.DisputeController.CreateDispute(Core.DTOs.Requests.CreateDisputeRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new dispute for a rejected annotation.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.DisputeController.ResolveDispute(Core.DTOs.Requests.ResolveDisputeRequest)
member.summary: Resolves an existing dispute by a Manager.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.DisputeController.GetDisputes(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all disputes for a specific project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.LabelController.CreateLabel(Core.DTOs.Requests.CreateLabelRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new label for a project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.LabelController.UpdateLabel(System.Int32,Core.DTOs.Requests.UpdateLabelRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing label by ID.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.LabelController.DeleteLabel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a label by ID.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.LabelController.GetLabelUsageCount(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the usage count of a specific label.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.LabelController.GetLabels(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all labels for a specific project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.NotificationController.GetMyNotifications
member.summary: Retrieves all notifications for the current user.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.NotificationController.MarkAsRead(System.Int32)
member.summary: Marks a specific notification as read.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.NotificationController.MarkAllAsRead
member.summary: Marks all notifications as read for the current user.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectController.AssignReviewers(Core.DTOs.Requests.AssignReviewersRequest)
member.summary: Assigns reviewers to a project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectController.GetUserProjectsForAdmin(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves all projects for a specific user (Admin only).

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectController.CreateProject(Core.DTOs.Requests.CreateProjectRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new labeling project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectController.RemoveUserFromProject(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Removes a user from a project and revokes their pending tasks.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectController.UpdateProject(System.Int32,Core.DTOs.Requests.UpdateProjectRequest)
member.summary: Updates project details.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectController.GetProjectDetails(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves detailed information about a specific project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectController.GetAllProjects
member.summary: Retrieves all projects based on the current user's role.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectController.GetProjectsByManager(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves all projects managed by a specific Manager.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectController.DeleteProject(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a project by ID.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectController.GetAllProjectsForAdmin
member.summary: Retrieves all projects for Admin dashboard overview.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectController.CompleteProject(System.Int32)
member.summary: Marks a project as completed.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectController.ArchiveProject(System.Int32)
member.summary: Archives a completed project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectDataController.ImportData(System.Int32,Core.DTOs.Requests.ImportDataRequest)
member.summary: Imports data items into a project using storage URLs.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectDataController.UploadDirect(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile})
member.summary: Uploads image files directly to the server and imports them as data items.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectDataController.GetBuckets(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all data buckets for a specific project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectDataController.ExportData(System.Int32)
member.summary: Exports all project data as a JSON file.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectDataController.ExportCsv(System.Int32)
member.summary: Exports all project data as a CSV file.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectStatsController.GetProjectStatistics(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves detailed statistics for a specific project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectStatsController.GetManagerStats(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves aggregated statistics for all projects managed by a specific Manager.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ProjectStatsController.ToggleUserLock(System.Int32,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Locks or unlocks a user within a specific project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ReviewController.GetReviewerProjects
member.summary: Retrieves all projects assigned to the current reviewer.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ReviewController.GetTasksForReview(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves tasks available for review in a specific project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ReviewController.ReviewTask(Core.DTOs.Requests.ReviewRequest)
member.summary: Submits a review (approve/reject) for an assignment.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ReviewController.AuditReview(Core.DTOs.Requests.AuditReviewRequest)
member.summary: Submits an audit review by a Manager for quality assurance.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ReviewController.GetReviewerStats
member.summary: Retrieves performance statistics for the current reviewer.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ReviewController.GetReviewQueueGroupedByAnnotator(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves the review queue grouped by annotator for a project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ReviewController.DeductOverdueReliabilityScores
member.summary: Deducts reliability scores for users with overdue tasks.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.ReviewController.GetBatchCompletionStatus(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves batch completion status for a project by the reviewer.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.TaskController.AssignTeamTasks(Core.DTOs.Requests.AssignTeamRequest)
member.summary: Assigns tasks to annotators and reviewers for a project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.TaskController.GetTasksByBucket(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves tasks for a specific bucket in a project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.TaskController.GetMyProjects
member.summary: Retrieves all projects assigned to the current user.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.TaskController.SubmitMultipleTasks(Core.DTOs.Requests.SubmitMultipleTasksRequest)
member.summary: Submits multiple tasks at once for review.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.TaskController.GetProjectImages(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all annotated images for a project assigned to the current user.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.TaskController.JumpToImage(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Jumps to a specific data item within a project.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.TaskController.GetSingleAssignment(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a single assignment by ID.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.TaskController.SaveDraft(Core.DTOs.Requests.SubmitAnnotationRequest)
member.summary: Saves annotation progress as a draft without submitting.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.TaskController.SubmitTask(Core.DTOs.Requests.SubmitAnnotationRequest)
member.summary: Submits a completed annotation task for review.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.GetMyProfile
member.summary: Retrieves the profile of the currently authenticated user.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.UpdateProfile(Core.DTOs.Requests.UpdateProfileRequest)
member.summary: Updates the profile of the currently authenticated user.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.UploadAvatar(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Uploads a new avatar image for the current user.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.ChangePassword(Core.DTOs.Requests.ChangePasswordRequest)
member.summary: Changes the password of the currently authenticated user.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.ImportUsers(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Imports multiple users from an Excel file.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.GetManagedUsers
member.summary: Retrieves all users managed by the current Manager.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.GetAllUsersNoPaging
member.summary: Retrieves all users without pagination (Admin only).

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.GetAllUsers(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all users with pagination.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.CreateUser(Core.DTOs.Requests.RegisterRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new user account (Admin only).

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.AdminChangePassword(System.String,Core.DTOs.Requests.AdminChangePasswordRequest)
member.summary: Resets a user's password by Admin.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.UpdateUser(System.String,Core.DTOs.Requests.UpdateUserRequest)
member.summary: Updates user information by Admin.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.ToggleUserStatus(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Activates or deactivates a user account.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.DeleteUser(System.String)
member.summary: Soft-deletes a user by deactivating the account.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.UserController.GetManagementBoard
member.summary: Retrieves all Managers and Admins for the management board.
